items.title: Copy code across repositories safely
items.oneliner: Google's repo migration tool rewrites history, transforms files, and syncs monorepo or open-source mirrors from one source of truth.

items.title: Run Kubernetes directly in browsers
items.oneliner: This TypeScript port simulates pods, networking, and registries in-browser, making Kubernetes demos and teaching setups instantly runnable.

items.title: Learn LLMs by implementing them
items.oneliner: Sebastian Raschka walks through building LLM architectures in Python and PyTorch, with concrete guidance from beginner projects to inference internals.

items.title: Build a voice agent in days
items.oneliner: This 7-day challenge walks you through shipping a voice AI agent that proactively notifies you when action is needed.

items.title: Generate ad creatives with Claude
items.oneliner: Hands-on guide shows how to install Goose Ads and turn a website into branded ad creatives in one command.

items.title: Study a real LLVM optimization
items.oneliner: Deep dive into SmallVector::push_back shows exactly how LLVM reduced stores and improved codegen for trivially copyable types.

items.title: Handle missing data with forests
items.oneliner: StatQuest demonstrates iterative random forest imputation and proximity matrices, with practical intuition for clustering and incomplete datasets.

items.title: Improve recurrent memory with orthogonalization
items.oneliner: This technical walkthrough tests matrix orthogonalization in mLSTMs and shows measurable gains on noisy associative recall tasks.

items.title: Create halftone effects in browsers
items.oneliner: Practical browser graphics tutorial shows how to build halftone visuals using canvas, SVG, HTML5, and CSS.

items.title: Fix Asahi Linux boot issues
items.oneliner: Asahi's progress report includes the macOS 27 boot workaround and testing details Apple Silicon users can apply today.
